subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Countenance of God! One of the loved ones of the All-Merciful hath mentioned in his letter thine ardor and attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بوجه الله یکی از احبای رحمن در مکتوب خویش ذکر وله و انجذاب آنجنابرا
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
